restaurant.name: Papa Roma Smoke House
restaurant.description: Experience the art of slow-smoked perfection at Dhanmondi's lakeside. From Texas-style BBQ to authentic Bengali cuisine and international flavors — Papa Roma brings you a culinary journey like no other.
restaurant.address: 5/A Satmasjid Road, Lake Side, Dhanmondi, Dhaka-1209
